class.name: PlayFabUsers
class.brief_description: Manual PlayFab sign-in and cached user lookup service.
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.users[/code]. Use this service to manually sign a local Xbox user into PlayFab, inspect cached [PlayFabUser] sessions, and react to sign-in or sign-out events.

method.name: sign_in_async
method.description: Starts PlayFab sign-in for the specified signed-in Xbox user. Pass a [code]GDKUser[/code]-like object or local id. The completed result data contains the signed-in [PlayFabUser].

method.name: get_user_by_local_id
method.description: Returns the cached [PlayFabUser] for the given local id, or [code]null[/code] if there is no cached session.

method.name: get_user
method.description: Returns a cached [PlayFabUser] from either a local id or a [PlayFabUser] object.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns an [Array] of cached signed-in [PlayFabUser] objects.

signal.name: user_signed_in
signal.description: Emitted when a PlayFab session is created for a local user.

signal.name: user_signed_out
signal.description: Emitted when a cached PlayFab user session is removed because the local Xbox user signed out.

signal.name: user_changed
signal.description: Emitted when an existing cached PlayFab user session is refreshed by another sign-in.
